note: Tail of JORDÁ (son) appears at start of this leaf but the entry's title is on leaf 643 (assigned there). Two new Balearic entries begin on this leaf.

entries.title: JORDI (ca)
entries.description: Predio en la isla de Mallorca, prov. de Baleares, part. jud. de Manacor, térm. y jurisd. de la v. de Santañí.
entries.note: Tail of JORDÁ (son) appears at start of this leaf but the entry's title is on leaf 643 (assigned there). Two new Balearic entries begin on this leaf.

entries.title: JORGE (San)
entries.description: L. en la isla, part. jud. y dióc. de Ibiza, prov., aud. terr., c. g. de Baleares, distrito municipal de San José: sit. á 1 leg. de la cap. pobl.: riqueza etc. (V. José San).
